violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). Air gap was observed in sanitizer line. Dispenser to be properly adjusted. Sanitizer must be manually mixed until dispenser is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager license expired. FMC must be re-instated after food safety manager certificate obtained. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2024
1. Laminate line wood panel by handwashing sink observed in poor repair. 2. Faucet at 3 bay sink observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Single service items (wax paper for foods) observed stored in a splash zone at the hand-washing sink at the time of this inspection. -Staff removed the single service items away from the hand-washing sink during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets in the Dairy chest freezer observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and inside of the dairy chest cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2023
